name: Skeletal Archer
description:
Unearth a skeletal archer from the dirt to fight by your side for 20 seconds, while granting you Major Brutality and Sorcery, increasing your Weapon and Spell Damage by 20%. The archer attacks the closest enemy every 2 seconds, dealing 463 Physical Damage.

Each time the archer deals damage, it deals 15% more damage than the previous attack.

Creates a corpse on death if you are in combat.
